docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,075.83 FILED BY ALEXANDER, ALEX AS TO DEFENDANT BESS, VIKKI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER, ALEX ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
